title: orthosiphon buchananii
intro: Orthosiphon buchananii, also known as Misai Kuching in Malay, is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orthosiphon buchananii include reducing kidney stones and improving urinary tract health, as well as aiding in the treatment of high blood pressure and diabetes. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
